RT by @lookner: Breaking News: After being trapped in Iran since December 2024 and facing charges of espionage and collaboration with a hostile state, Dena Karari, a dual American and Iranian citizen, is free and out of Iran and on her way back to the United States, said Jared Genser, her lawyer in the United States. She was banned from leaving Iran after visiting her family in Shiraz, and was repeatedly interrogated but not detained, said Genser. President Trump said in a social media post that the United States appreciated the gesture of goodwill.

RT by @Faytuks: 🚨 My report on i24NEWS: Israel assesses that the U.S. is stepping up preparations for the possibility of a renewed full-scale military confrontation with Iran.
